title: Silly Sentence Builder
description: A sentence structure game where kids assemble who, action, place, and how picture cards into spoken silly sentences.
learningGoals: Hear subject, action, and setting in order
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap picture cards onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct cards pop, sparkle, and speak their sentence part; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds are read aloud as silly full sentences.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder card art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
